code:
import io
import string

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut pos = -1
  mut i = 0
  while i < n and pos == -1
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 61
        pos = i
      end
    when None
      pos = pos
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if pos > 0
    let key = string.substring(line, 0, pos)
    let value = string.substring(line, pos + 1, n)
    print("#{key}:#{value}")
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut done = false
  while not done
    match io.read_line()
    when None
      done = true
    when Some(line)
      process(line)
    end
  end
end
